atomic_facts.fact: A hand is holding a decorated cupcake in the foreground.
The cupcake features green frosting resembling grass and pastel-colored candy eggs.
Several other cupcakes are arranged on the dark surface in the background.

spatial: The hand holding the cupcake is in the foreground, positioned centrally. The held cupcake is in front of the other cupcakes, which are arranged on the dark grey surface in the background.

The cupcake features pastel-colored frosting flowers and candy eggs.
Twelve other cupcakes are arranged on the dark surface behind the held cupcake.
